commands.name: scaffold
commands.purpose: plan or write placeholder target adapter structure

commands.name: validate-adapter
commands.purpose: validate adapter structure and optionally enforce machine-readable approval scope

commands.name: doctor
commands.purpose: report read-only installed adapter health and prioritized repair operations

commands.name: migration-report
commands.purpose: compare framework baselines without applying an upgrade

commands.name: context-costs
commands.purpose: measure static target context routing cost

commands.name: check-conformance
commands.purpose: check prepared or externally executed conformance matrices

commands.name: check-benchmark
commands.purpose: validate paired benchmark isolation and reviewed evidence

commands.name: summarize-benchmark
commands.purpose: summarize reviewed benchmark measurements and deltas
